titleStmt.title: SII 7.782: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 782. (A.R. No. 157 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanacakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu rājarāja vaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu Utavi tirumāṇikuḻi yāḷuṭaiyāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum tiruviḷakkukkum tiruppaṇikaḷukkum mokan
Āḻkkoḷḷiāna kulottuṅkacoḻa kkāṭavarāyanen Ittevar tirunāmattukāṇiThis word is written over an erasure.Uḷḷūr tirupperampalam ponmeyn=ta perumāḷnallūr vaṭapāṟkellai tirukkeṭilattu niroṭukālukku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai tiruvayin=ti rapurattāḻ
vār tevatānam pirekameṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭu ttiruvariyiliṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai yañcāṅ kaṇṇāṟeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mānakān=ta ṉeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa
voṭaiyil melācaṟitikku kkiḻakkum yinnāṉkellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil nirnilamuṅ kollaiyum nattamum tirunan=ta navanaṅkaḷum kamuku tirunan=ta navanaṅkaḷum ponmeyn=ta- perumāṇallū rellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Irupattunālumāvum kulo
ttuṅkacoḻanallū rellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilam nāṟpatumāvum Ālappākkattil piṟin=ta Etirilicoḻanallūr nilam Aṟupattu Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇiyum Inna ttanilam Irupattu nālumāvum coḻakulavallinallūrt tenpiṭākai villiyanallū(r)
ril vikkiramacoḻanallūreṉṟu piṟin=ta Ūrkkki ḻiṟaiyili nilam nāṟpatumāvum Ivvūril Eytanūrkkaṭṭaḷaiyil Iraṇṭāyiravar tirunun=tā viḷakkuppuṟam muṉṟumāvum paṭṭānpākka ttukkaṭṭaḷaiyil nilam muṉṟumāvum tiripuvanamāteviccaturvetimaṅkala
ttut tenpiṭākai cempiyanmātevivaḷanāṭṭil peruñcānpākkattu nattattukku kkiḻakku Āmaipaḷḷameṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattu nilam Ampatumāvum Ivvūrkaḷil perumpāṭikāvalāl Iṭakkaṭaviyina vellām Ittevaṟku tiruppaṭi
māṟṟukku n=ti ruviḷakkukkum tiruppaṇikaḷukkum maṟṟum veṇṭum niman=ta ṅkaḷukkum perumpāṭikāval tavirttu Ittevarkku kkal veṭṭikkuṭutten mokan Āḻkkoḷḷiyāna kulottuṅkacoḻa kkāṭavarāyanen Ittanmam Aḻippār tiruvāṇai
tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyā rāṇai tiruviraiyākkali naṭuvukottuvil piṭicār Ittanma maḻippān vallavaraiyan cattiyam vātāvikaḷukku piḻaittārāvār Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 7.782 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
